scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The pinned GF vendor snapshot was upgraded from 7.0.0 to the official 8.0.1 release at bc8f38f. The audited GF global class count remains 703 and the project runtime class count remains 126. The full 196-test audit exited at ObjectDB 263 and Resources 116 with the same three RID types, so all existing limits remain unchanged.
